name: ABS
description: Prevents wheel lock-up during braking for better control.

name: Electronic Stability Control
description: Helps maintain vehicle stability during sudden maneuvers.

name: Airbags
description: Provides additional protection in case of a collision.

name: Lane Departure Warning
description: Alerts you if the vehicle drifts out of its lane.

name: Automatic Emergency Braking
description: Automatically applies brakes to prevent or reduce impact.

name: Blind Spot Monitoring
description: Warns you of vehicles in your blind spots.

name: Parking Sensors
description: Detects nearby objects to assist with parking.

name: Rear View Camera
description: Displays the area behind the car when reversing.

name: Air Conditioning
description: Keeps the cabin cool and comfortable.

name: Dual-zone Climate Control
description: Allows separate temperature settings for driver and passenger.

name: Heated Seats
description: Provides warmth for seats in cold weather.

name: Leather Seats
description: Premium seating material for added comfort.

name: Keyless Entry
description: Unlock the car without using a physical key.

name: Keyless Start
description: Start the engine with a button instead of a key.

name: Bluetooth
description: Connect your phone wirelessly for calls and audio.

name: Apple CarPlay
description: Integrates your iPhone with the car’s infotainment system.

name: Android Auto
description: Connects Android devices to the car’s display.

name: USB Ports
description: Charge devices or connect media via USB.

name: Navigation System (GPS)
description: Built-in navigation to guide your journey.

name: Touchscreen Display
description: Interactive screen for controlling car features.

name: Cruise Control
description: Maintains a constant speed without pressing the accelerator.

name: Adaptive Cruise Control
description: Automatically adjusts speed to keep a safe distance.

name: Automatic Transmission
description: Shifts gears automatically for easier driving.

name: All-Wheel Drive (AWD)
description: Provides better traction by powering all wheels.
